fields.field_a: Stochastic thermodynamics — TUR, entropy production bounds
fields.field_c: Bacterial cell biology — cell size homeostasis via adder model

hypotheses.title: DnaA-ATP Counting at oriC Is a Thermodynamically Near-Optimal Molecular Current for the Bacterial Adder
hypotheses.connection: Stochastic thermodynamics (TUR) → DnaA-ATP binding at oriC as molecular counting current → Bacterial adder model size precision
hypotheses.key_prediction: CV_added >= 7.07%; E. coli at 1.4x TUR floor; no strain achieves CV < 7%
grounded_claims: DnaA oriC binding sites ~20 (Grimwade & Leonard 2021, Front Microbiol)
Oscillators 10^4-10^6x from TUR (Marsland et al. 2019, J R Soc Interface)
parametric_claims: Markov process assumption for DnaA counting

hypotheses.title: RIDA-Mediated ATP Hydrolysis Functions as Irreversible Counter-Reset Whose Dissipation Cost Sets the Adder's Landauer Erasure Price
hypotheses.connection: Information-theoretic erasure cost → Hda/RIDA as irreversible counter-reset → Adder counting fidelity across generations
hypotheses.key_prediction: Hda loss -> CV up; Hda excess -> CV unchanged below 7%; adder-to-timer regression shift
grounded_claims: RIDA mechanism (Kato & Katayama 2001, EMBO J; STRING DnaA-Hda 0.962)
Landauer principle (Landauer 1961, IBM J Res Dev)

hypotheses.title: Non-Monotonic DnaA Copy Number Generates Counterintuitive Precision Maximum at Intermediate Growth Rates
hypotheses.connection: DnaA proteomics scaling → Growth-rate-dependent TUR floor landscape → Precision maximum near 0.7 dbl/hr
hypotheses.key_prediction: Counting noise peak at 0.7 dbl/hr; decomposable from extrinsic noise
grounded_claims: DnaA non-monotonic copy number (Schmidt et al. 2016, Nat Biotechnol 34:104)
CV_added increases monotonically at slow growth (mother-machine data)

hypotheses.title: Multi-Fork Replication Creates Parallel Counting Currents Whose Correlation Structure Reveals DnaA Pool Sharing
hypotheses.connection: Multi-current TUR → Overlapping replication rounds as parallel DnaA-ATP counters → Correlated noise structure
hypotheses.key_prediction: DnaA overexpression reduces CV at fast growth (n>1) but not slow growth (n=1)
grounded_claims: Multi-fork replication (Cooper & Helmstetter 1968, J Mol Biol)
Parallel averaging and correlated counter formulas (standard statistics)

hypotheses.title: ppGpp Alarmone Coordinates Thermodynamically Near-Optimal Trajectory Through Precision-Dissipation Plane Under Stress
hypotheses.connection: TUR bound curve → ppGpp modulates both dissipation and counting current → Stringent response as coordinated trajectory
hypotheses.key_prediction: ppGpp titration traces CV^2 x Sigma ~ 2 (near TUR bound)
grounded_claims: ppGpp reduces DnaA levels (Skarstad & Katayama reviews)
ppGpp0 strains with inducible RelA (published constructs)
parametric_claims: DnaA-ATP/ADP measurement at multiple ppGpp levels

hypotheses.title: First-Passage TUR Establishes Thermodynamic Cost Hierarchy: Adder Is Cheapest, Timer Is Most Expensive
hypotheses.connection: First-passage TUR → Different homeostasis models define different currents → Distinct dissipation costs per unit precision
hypotheses.key_prediction: Timer >> sizer > adder in cost; Caulobacter > E. coli in size-sensing dissipation
grounded_claims: Caulobacter sizer-like behavior (Campos et al. 2014, Cell)
parametric_claims: First-passage TUR form (Gingrich & Horowitz 2017 cited but uncertain)

hypotheses.title: MinCDE Oscillation Dissipation Sets TUR Floor for Division Site Positioning That Operates at Lower Efficiency Than DnaA Counting
hypotheses.connection: Periodic TUR → MinD ATPase oscillation → Spatial positioning precision of FtsZ ring
hypotheses.bridge_mechanism: Periodic TUR for oscillatory spatial precision
hypotheses.key_prediction: Min at 15-25x TUR floor; DnaA at 1.4x; Min is precision bottleneck
parametric_claims: Z-ring positioning sigma ~3-5% of cell length

hypotheses.title: Cross-Species Adder Precision Scales with oriC DnaA-Box Count via Universal TUR Law
hypotheses.connection: Species-specific N_eff → Variable TUR floors → Universal scaling law: CV^2_min x N_boxes = constant
hypotheses.key_prediction: CV^2_min x N_boxes ~ 0.1 across bacterial species; B. subtilis CV_min > E. coli CV_min
